input.command:
python3 -c "
import csv
with open('/lustre/fast/fast/sgoel/forecasting/current_sim/final_runs_v37/opencode_aljazeeraQ12026v37_qwen36plus/26-05-02-00-01-06/agents/minimalHarness_qwen_qwen36-plus_001/workspace/market.csv') as f:
    reader = csv.DictReader(f)
    rows = list(reader)

for r in rows:
    rd = r.get('resolution_date','').strip()
    if rd and rd == '2026-03-12':
        print(f'QID: {r[\"qid\"]}')
        print(f'Title: {r[\"title\"]}')
        print(f'Background: {r[\"background\"][:300] if r[\"background\"] else \"N/A\"}')
        print('---')
"

QID: 169286
Title: In which country will US officials say a base is located where an Iranian missile strike damaged five KC-135 refuelling aircraft by March 19, 2026?
Background: Question Start Date: 2026-03-04. The conflict between the United States and Iran creates risks for US aircraft and bases across the Middle East. Reports of missile damage at regional facilities may emerge through official statements or reputable media coverage.
---
QID: 214539
Title: What Iranian island will Donald Trump say US forces bombed military installations on by March 14, 2026?
Background: Question Start Date: 2026-02-28. Fighting involving the United States, Israel, and Iran is raising fears of wider escalation in the Middle East. Analysts are watching whether attacks spread to places linked to shipping and energy exports.
---
QID: 857856
Title: Which team will remain alive through a Women’s World Cup qualifying playoff after losing the AFC Women’s Asian Cup quarterfinal on March 13, 2026?
Background: Question Start Date: 2026-03-05. In the AFC Women’s Asian Cup, some teams that do not win in the quarterfinals can still continue toward World Cup qualification through later playoff matches.
---
QID: 679215
Title: What ship will be named as carrying about 3,500 US military personnel to the Middle East by March 31, 2026?
Background: Question Start Date: 2026-03-11. The United States is moving additional forces around the Middle East as regional fighting continues. This question asks about the name of a specific ship that may be identified in public military statements or reliable news reporting.
---
QID: 764041
Title: Which southern Lebanese village will be identified by March 14, 2026, as the site of an Israeli strike on a health centre that kills 12 medical workers?
Background: Question Start Date: 2026-02-28. Fighting between Israel and Hezbollah is continuing across southern Lebanon. Medical facilities and emergency workers are operating in a high-risk environment as air strikes and cross-border attacks intensify.
---
